body.title: [sprint] A new intention is checked against the standing set and HALTS until reconciled (contradiction, not veto)
body.intention: I intend that a new intention is checked against every standing intention at design time, and that an irreconcilable pair halts the work until a human reconciles it, so intentions compete and disagree openly instead of silently coexisting.
body.description:
Intentions are living entities: they compete (lateral tension), merge/fold, decompose, and prove/disprove. Competition is the load-bearing half and it is not built. Today a new intention can contradict a standing one and nothing notices.

The mechanism is CONTRADICTION-DETECTION, NOT VETO (I-compiled-inference-residue): 'A new intention that can't be reconciled with the standing set halts until reconciled. Contradiction is structural and moodless; a veto would have a dial and could go rose- or shit-colored.' Keeping the gate as contradiction rather than scoring is what keeps mood out of it. The six core values (CP1-CP6) are simply the standing intentions installed first and never evictable.

This is the design-end check Akien named: 'we can have intentions compete. disagree until reconciled. and that needs to be in the design end. checking new intentions against old ones.'

Distinct from T-sorted-intention-open-then-map, which is the READ half (surface the extant list). This ticket is the CONTRADICTION half (compare, detect, halt).

**Affected files:** skills/sorted (design-time hook), skills/audit-design (Check 6 currently compares against 30d of decisions — extend to standing intentions), a new reconciliation surface in the intentions store, unseen_university/ reader for the standing set.
**Design rules:** canonical memory home devlab/runtime/memory/; contradiction not veto (no scoring dial); CP1 — an undetectable contradiction is a confabulated coherence; halt-until-sorted (CP6).
**Scope boundary:** IN — read the standing intention set, detect contradiction between a candidate intention and each standing one, HALT design until a human reconciles (merge / supersede / decompose / accept-tension-with-reason), record the reconciliation as an edge. OUT — automated resolution of a contradiction (a human reconciles; the gate never picks a winner); scoring/ranking intentions; the intention envelope schema (T-intentions-store); the edge kind (T-links-intentions-edge-kind).
**Test plan:** hermetic. Seed a standing intention and a deliberately contradictory candidate; assert the gate HALTS and names both sides. Seed a compatible candidate; assert it passes. Red form: at HEAD, no gate exists, so the contradictory pair passes silently — that IS the red.
**Completion criteria:** a contradictory candidate intention halts the design flow and names the standing intention it contradicts; a reconciliation is recordable as an edge; a compatible candidate passes untouched; the gate never auto-resolves.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.completion_criteria: Contradictory candidate halts design and names both intentions; reconciliation recorded as an edge; compatible candidate passes; no auto-resolution path exists.
body.gate: T-intentions-store + T-links-intentions-edge-kind — needs the store and the edge before a standing set can be read
